description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a large, rectangular metallic head with slightly beveled edges and a central circular marking on each striking face. The head is made of a dark, metallic material with a slightly reflective, worn finish, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty impact tasks. The handle is long, cylindrical, and crafted from wood, displaying a natural brown color with visible grain and several dark grip bands encircling it for enhanced handling. The handle appears straight and tapers slightly towards the end, providing a secure grip for two-handed use. The overall construction is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The hammer shows no visible signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments, indicating it is either new or well-maintained.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a large metallic head and a long, straight wooden handle featuring grip bands. The tool is utilitarian and shows no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat striking face of the metallic head with a central circular marking and the wooden handle extending backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the full length of the straight wooden handle and the rectangular profile of the metallic head.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the end of the wooden handle and the back face of the hammer head, mirroring the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the length of the handle and the rectangular metallic head, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with visible grain and multiple dark grip bands, cylindrical and slightly tapered for a secure two-handed grip.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of steel, with flat striking faces and slightly beveled edges, featuring a central circular marking on each face.
